narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure and Iran-US escalation drive a geopolitical risk premium as crude surges toward $100—USD/JPY firms to 157.19 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand. JPY remains the G8 laggard (-0.535% avg) despite the conflict; gold higher +0.45%; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 18.4. Watch BoJ Summary of Opinions and US CPI tomorrow for directional cues.
